mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form ORDER BY form_category_idx ASC, sort_no ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form ORDER BY form_category_idx ASC, sort_no ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form WHERE form_category = #{formCategory} ORDER BY sort_no ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form WHERE form_category = #{formCategory} ORDER BY sort_no ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form WHERE form_category LIKE '%' + #{formCategory} + '%' ORDER BY form_category_idx ASC, sort_no ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form WHERE form_category LIKE '%' + #{formCategory} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_basic_form WHERE form_category_idx = #{formCategoryIdx} ORDER BY sort_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_assessment_basic_form (form_category, form_category_idx, sort_no, danger, expected_disaster, target, risk_4m, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{formCategory}, #{formCategoryIdx}, #{sortNo}, #{danger}, #{expectedDisaster}, #{target}, #{risk4m}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_basic_form SET form_category = #{formCategory}, form_category_idx = #{formCategoryIdx}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, danger = #{danger}, expected_disaster = #{expectedDisaster}, target = #{target}, risk_4m = #{risk4m}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
